PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?country ?countryLabel ?governmentType ?governmentTypeLabel WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P30 ?continent .
  ?continent rdfs:label ?continentLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?continentLabel) , "en"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?continentLabel) , "north america"))
  ?country wdt:P122 ?governmentType .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?countryLabel) , "en"))
  ?governmentType rdfs:label ?governmentTypeLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?governmentTypeLabel) , "en"))
}
